figures.caption: Figure 9. Node-reusing MCTS algorithm with four phases.
Figure 1. Two categories of the TTCS method: (a) sequential search and (b) parallel search. t denotes the time.
Figure 7. Impact of request arrival rates on p50 (darker) and p99 (lighter) end-to-end latency across different search strategies.
